# Z Squared Multimedia Productions

> Z Squared Multimedia Productions LLC is a Las Vegas-based broadcast production company founded in 2016 by owner and Director of Photography Kyle Zuelke, a 5-time Regional Emmy, Peabody, duPont-Columbia, and SPJ Sigma Delta Chi award winner. The company provides ENG/EFP camera crews, live transmission, multi-cam production, documentary, and brand video services to networks, leagues, and brands including ESPN, NFL Network, UFC, WWE, the Las Vegas Raiders, the WNBA (Aces), the LVCVA, and DAZN. Available 24/7 with same-day quotes.

## Company

- Legal name: Z Squared Multimedia Productions LLC
- Location: Las Vegas, NV
- Founded: 2016, by Kyle Zuelke
- Owner / Director of Photography: Kyle Zuelke — 5x Regional Emmy, Peabody, duPont-Columbia, and SPJ Sigma Delta Chi award winner. Started his career in Omaha in 2002, joined KLAS-TV Las Vegas's I-Team in 2003, spent 13 years there before founding Z Squared in 2016.
- Phone: 702-533-1333 (+1-702-533-1333)
- Email: zsquaredmultimedia@gmail.com
- Availability: 24/7, same-day quotes
- Gear: 2x Sony FX9, Arri Amira, Sony FX3
- Notable clients: ESPN, NFL Network, UFC, WWE, Las Vegas Raiders, WNBA (Aces), LVCVA, DAZN

## Services

- ENG/EFP camera crews
- Live transmission (fiber, TVU, RTMP, SRT)
- Cinema and broadcast gear packages
- Multi-cam production and live streaming (up to 14 cameras)
- Documentary and long-form production
- Brand and social video
- Published pricing: standard ENG crew $1,950 per 10-hour day; full ENG/EFP package $3,000 per 10-hour day

## Service Area

- Las Vegas Valley: the Strip, Downtown/Fremont, Henderson, Summerlin, North Las Vegas, Paradise, Spring Valley, Enterprise, Whitney
- Clark County, Nevada
- Los Angeles
